creator: dan.kotowski@a9development.com
text:
$ cat /usr/local/etc/poudriere.conf | sed -E -e 's/#.*$//g' -e '/^ *$/d'
ZPOOL=zroot
ZROOTFS=/poudriere
FREEBSD_HOST=https://download.FreeBSD.org
RESOLV_CONF=/etc/resolv.conf
BASEFS=/usr/local/poudriere
POUDRIERE_DATA=${BASEFS}/data
USE_PORTLINT=no
USE_TMPFS=yes
DISTFILES_CACHE=/usr/local/poudriere/ports/distfiles
CHECK_CHANGED_OPTIONS=verbose
CHECK_CHANGED_DEPS=yes
PKG_REPO_SIGNING_KEY=/usr/local/etc/ssl/keys/poudriere.key
PARALLEL_JOBS=16
ALLOW_MAKE_JOBS_PACKAGES="llvm* rust node* gcc* qt5-webengine webkit2-gtk3 py*"
URL_BASE=http://pkg1.a9development.com/poudriere/
PRIORITY_BOOST="llvm* rust node gcc* qt5-webengine webkit2-gtk3"
